/projects/wanderlust-japan.title: Wanderlust Japan | NOIRI Studio
/projects/wanderlust-japan.description: Wanderlust Japan — Photography project exploring cinematic visuals, editorial imagery, and art direction by NOIRI Studio.
p: Capturing the serene beauty of Japan, where blooming cherry blossoms frame temples and mountains in harmonious landscapes.

Wanderlust Japan highlights the tranquil and captivating scenery of Japan through iconic landscapes. From delicate pink cherry blossoms in full bloom to historic temples and distant mountains, each photograph emphasizes composition, color, and atmosphere, inviting viewers to immerse themselves in the serene beauty of the locations.

By focusing on nature and architectural landmarks rather than people, the series celebrates the harmony between culture and environment. Every image conveys a sense of calm, reflection, and the timeless elegance of Japan’s scenic vistas.

Through Wanderlust Japan, fleeting moments in nature and cultural spaces are transformed into lasting impressions. The project celebrates color, light, and harmony, reminding viewers of the subtle and profound beauty found in every corner of Kyoto and beyond.

/projects/intimate-faces.title: Intimate Faces | NOIRI Studio
/projects/intimate-faces.description: Intimate Faces — Photography project exploring cinematic visuals, editorial imagery, and art direction by NOIRI Studio.
p: Exploring the depth of human expression through close-up portraits that reveal emotion in every detail.

Intimate Faces focuses on capturing the subtleties of human expression in close-up portraits. By framing the subjects from the shoulders up, the series emphasizes eyes, gestures, and the nuances that make each individual unique. Every photograph is an exploration of character, mood, and personality, drawing the viewer into a more personal connection with the subject.

The approach highlights texture, light, and detail in ways that full-body compositions cannot, creating an immersive experience. Each portrait becomes a study of human presence, where emotion and identity are brought to the forefront, inviting reflection and engagement.

Through Intimate Faces, every glance, every expression, and every subtle movement tells a story. The close framing amplifies the connection between subject and viewer, celebrating the individuality and authenticity of each person captured.

/projects/pixel-perfect.title: Pixel Perfect | NOIRI Studio
/projects/pixel-perfect.description: Pixel Perfect — Photography project exploring cinematic visuals, editorial imagery, and art direction by NOIRI Studio.
p: Highlighting the precision and detail of high-quality photography through close-up facial shots.

Pixel Perfect focuses on the meticulous detail captured in high-resolution portraits. Each image emphasizes the clarity of skin texture, the sharpness of the eyes, and the subtle nuances of facial expression, showcasing the technical excellence of the photography. By concentrating on the face, the project celebrates the art of precision and the beauty found in fine detail.

Through careful lighting and composition, the portraits reveal the personality and individuality of each subject, allowing viewers to appreciate both the technical mastery and the emotional depth of the moment. Pixel Perfect transforms ordinary portraits into studies of perfection and presence.

Through Pixel Perfect, every detail matters. The project celebrates the artistry behind high-quality photography, reminding us that excellence is found in precision, focus, and attention to the smallest elements that bring a subject to life.

/projects/game-in-motion.title: Game in Motion | NOIRI Studio
/projects/game-in-motion.description: Game in Motion — Photography project exploring cinematic visuals, editorial imagery, and art direction by NOIRI Studio.
p: Capturing the energy and intensity of basketball through dynamic black-and-white moments.

Game in Motion celebrates the movement, strategy, and emotion inherent in basketball. Each black-and-white frame highlights the athleticism and focus of the players, freezing a split-second of action that tells the story of the game. From a fast break to a crucial jump shot, the images capture both skill and tension in the court’s atmosphere.

The monochrome approach emphasizes contrast, form, and motion over color, allowing the viewer to focus entirely on the energy and composition. Every shot becomes a narrative of determination, teamwork, and the fleeting beauty of sports in action.

Through Game in Motion, the sport is seen not just as a game, but as a choreography of human skill and emotion. The black-and-white imagery transforms moments of competition into timeless expressions of movement and dedication.

/projects/soft-focus.title: Soft Focus | NOIRI Studio
/projects/soft-focus.description: Soft Focus — Photography project exploring cinematic visuals, editorial imagery, and art direction by NOIRI Studio.
p: Exploring moments softened by light and motion, where clarity blends with imagination to create dreamlike scenes.

Soft Focus captures the ethereal quality of everyday life through blurred imagery. Each shot transforms ordinary moments into something abstract and poetic, inviting the viewer to experience the feeling rather than the details. From a lone woman standing in an open field to a group of elegantly dressed people, the blur creates a sense of intimacy and movement that draws attention to emotion over form.

This technique allows the city and nature alike to become a canvas, highlighting moods and atmospheres that might otherwise go unnoticed. Soft Focus encourages the audience to slow down and immerse themselves in the subtle interplay of light, color, and motion, where reality and perception merge seamlessly.

Through Soft Focus, the mundane becomes enchanting. The blurred edges invite interpretation, and every frame emphasizes mood, rhythm, and the ephemeral beauty of the moment. It is a study in how perception shapes emotion, reminding us that not every detail needs clarity to tell a story.

/projects/urban-crossings.title: Urban Crossings | NOIRI Studio
/projects/urban-crossings.description: Urban Crossings — Photography project exploring cinematic visuals, editorial imagery, and art direction by NOIRI Studio.
p: Capturing the fleeting rhythm of city life, where every step tells a story and every crossing becomes a moment worth noticing.

Urban Crossings explores the quiet choreography of the city streets. Each crosswalk becomes a stage where everyday life unfolds naturally—people moving with purpose, subtle gestures, and fleeting interactions all create moments of unplanned beauty.

The architecture, traffic, and pedestrians together form a dynamic backdrop, revealing patterns and rhythms that often go unnoticed. This series invites the viewer to slow down, observe, and appreciate the small, orchestrated gestures that make city life both lively and unpredictable.

Through Urban Crossings, the ordinary transforms into the extraordinary. Each frame celebrates movement, geometry, and the serendipitous encounters that define the pulse of New York City. It is a tribute to the unnoticed moments that shape our everyday urban experience, reminding us that beauty often lives in the simplest acts.

/about.title: About | NOIRI Studio
/about.description: NOIRI Studio is a creative photography studio exploring cinematic visuals, experiential storytelling, and a dark, refined visual language.
p: At NOIRI, we create cinematic and editorial visuals that capture emotion, atmosphere, and intention. Our work blends photography and film to help brands, artists, and individuals communicate with depth and clarity.

We believe every frame is part of a story. That belief shapes how we plan, shoot, and craft each project—from intimate portraits to large-scale commercial films. With a focus on mood, composition, and narrative, our goal is to elevate ideas into powerful visual experiences.
Every collaboration is built on trust, exploration, and a shared vision. NOIRI is where creativity meets direction, and where concepts become compelling visual worlds.
To craft cinematic and editorial visuals that communicate emotion with clarity and purpose.
To redefine how brands and creators express themselves through meaningful, story-driven imagery.
Every project at NOIRI contributes to a growing narrative of thoughtful craftsmanship and visual storytelling. These milestones reflect the reach and resonance of our work.
As the eye behind NOIRI’s visual direction, Leo shapes concepts into cinematic expressions. His approach focuses on mood, storytelling, and a refined sense of detail.
Tell us what you have in mind—we’ll craft cinematic visuals that feel intentional, emotional, and unmistakably yours.
